text.title: Microservices Observability Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping observability gap to a pillar rule.

conclusion.verdict: audit PII redaction + finalize SLO targets
switch logger to JSON + add OTel-MDC bridge
expose Prometheus /metrics with RED histograms per endpoint
install OTel SDK + auto-instrumentation + W3C propagator

text.example: missing=all → execute full procedure (logs → metrics → tracing → propagator → PII redaction).
